# Insight2Strategy
> B2B marketing strategy consultancy serving companies with 15 to 500 employees at marketing inflection points -- the moment when what got you here is no longer enough to get you to the next level.

Insight2Strategy provides rapid diagnostic services and full strategic engagements covering positioning, go-to-market strategy, marketing diagnostics, AI readiness, competitive intelligence, and ideal customer profile validation. Founded 2025 by Joe Morrison. Sector-agnostic B2B, not technology-specific.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://www.insight2strategy.com/

## What we do

Insight2Strategy helps B2B companies with 15 to 500 employees diagnose and resolve marketing problems at inflection points. Services range from rapid 1-3 day diagnostic reports ($197-$1,000) to full strategic engagements (3-12 weeks, $3,500+).

Common problems we solve:
- Marketing is active but not generating qualified leads
- Positioning is unclear or undifferentiated
- Messaging is not converting the right buyers
- Company is not visible in AI search results (GEO gap) -- see AI Visibility Reality Check ($497)
- Unclear whether to hire an agency, a marketing director, or a consultant
- AI tools have been purchased but are not delivering results
- No marketing team and need a strategy before hiring anyone

We work with professional services firms, manufacturing companies, SaaS businesses, consulting practices, distribution companies, and B2B service businesses across any industry.
